ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Provides 'Python'-style list comprehensions. List comprehension expressions use usual loops (for(), while() and repeat()) and usual if() as list producers. In many cases it gives more concise notation than standard "*apply + filter" strategy.

Provides 'Python'-style list comprehensions. List comprehension expressions use usual loops (for(), while() and repeat()) and usual if() as list producers. In many cases it gives more concise notation than standard "*apply + filter" strategy.

name: r-comprehenr
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '0.6.10' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-comprehenr
  version: "{{ version|replace('-', '_') }}"

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/comprehenr_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/comprehenr/comprehenr_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 5c08efe824278b086a9f45823b2239206b3190e463c607d3ebb690cab5018cf2

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
  run:
    - r-base

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('comprehenr')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('comprehenr')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://github.com/gdemin/comprehenr
  license: GPL-2.0-only
  summary: Provides 'Python'-style list comprehensions. List comprehension expressions use usual
    loops (for(), while() and repeat()) and usual if() as list producers. In many cases
    it gives more concise notation than standard "*apply + filter" strategy.
  license_family: GPL2
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-2'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r
